title: Power outages hit France as record heatwave set to peak
summary_full: The heatwave is expected to spread to other parts of western Europe on Wednesday, before extending eastwards over the weekend.
summary_public: The heatwave is expected to spread to other parts of western Europe on Wednesday, before extending eastwards over the weekend.
